name: ReportBuilder

unions.name: ReportBuilder
unions.comment:
A report builder is a data structure that allows you to build a report
with a list of records and a list of fields. You can add fields to the
report and then generate a CSV representation of the report.

values.name: addField
values.comment: Add a field to the report builder.
values.type: ReportBuilder.Field.Field a -> ReportBuilder.ReportBuilder a -> ReportBuilder.ReportBuilder a

values.name: downloadCsv
values.comment:
Generate a command to download the CSV representation of the report
builder.

values.name: new
values.comment: Create a new report builder with a list of records.

values.name: toCsv
values.comment: Convert a report builder to a CSV string.

values.name: withName
values.comment:
Set the name of the report builder.

This is used for generating the filename when downloading the CSV.

name: ReportBuilder.Field

unions.name: Field
unions.comment:
A field describes a column in a report. It has a name, an accessor function
and a type.

unions.name: FieldAccess
unions.comment: A field accessor is a function that takes a record and returns a string.

values.name: bool
values.comment: Define field access for a boolean.
values.type: { true : String.String, false : String.String } -> (a -> Basics.Bool) -> ReportBuilder.Field.FieldAccess a

values.name: encode
values.comment: Given a field and a corresponding record, return the value of the field.

values.name: header
values.comment: Get the header value of a field.

values.name: int
values.comment: Define field access for an integer.

values.name: isNumeric
values.comment: Check if a field is numeric.

values.name: lengthOf
values.comment: Define field access for the length of a list.

values.name: new
values.comment: Create a new field with a name and an accessor function.

values.name: optional
values.type: ((a -> b) -> ReportBuilder.Field.FieldAccess a) -> (a -> Maybe.Maybe b) -> ReportBuilder.Field.FieldAccess a

values.name: string
values.comment: Define field access for a string.
